name: businessfeed
description: A self-hosted business activity feed with read-only connectors and a fast timeline UI.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @businessfeed/api" "npm run dev -w @businessfeed/web"
scripts.db:note: node -e "console.log('BusinessFeed creates local SQLite tables on API startup; add generated migrations when schema history is needed.')"
